danger_formalization.robot_task: Deliver a water bottle to a bedside table.
danger_formalization.cause_of_danger: Robot places the water bottle too close to the edge of the bedside table, making it prone to falling.
danger_formalization.result_of_danger: Human slips on the fallen water bottle while getting out of bed, leading to injuries such as fractures or pneumothorax.
danger_formalization.danger_action: Placing the water bottle on the edge of the bedside table.
danger_formalization.instantaneous_solution: Robot detects the table edge using sensors and repositions the water bottle to the center of the table before release.
danger_formalization.assumptions: Robot has basic object detection and placement capabilities in a controlled indoor environment.
